runs.note: Fixed SQL injection by converting all query functions from db.unsafeQuery() to parameterized db.query() calls. Added HTML entity encoding in renderPost() to prevent XSS. Implemented ORDER BY allowlist validation in listPosts() to prevent injection via sort parameter.
